name: maplebear-takeover
description: MapleBear TakeOver - Minecraft Bedrock Edition Addon

scripts.validate:json: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const path=require('path');let ok=0,fail=0;const walk=(d)=>{for(const e of fs.readdirSync(d,{withFileTypes:true})){const p=path.join(d,e.name);if(e.isDirectory())walk(p);else if(e.name.endsWith('.json')){try{JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(p,'utf8'));ok++}catch(err){console.error(p+': '+err.message);fail++}}}};walk('BP');walk('RP');console.log(ok+' JSON files valid, '+fail+' failed');if(fail)process.exit(1)"
scripts.validate:syntax: for f in BP/scripts/*.js; do node --check "$f" || exit 1; done && echo 'All JS files pass syntax check'
scripts.validate: npm run validate:json && npm run validate:syntax
scripts.check: npm run validate && npm run lint

author: Maple Bear Industries
